user_query: Father likes eggs for breakfast. Add a classic egg based breakfast option for him on the day with the Smoky Base Pork Dinner

fields.name: Classic Eggs & Sautéed Tomatoes
fields.short_description: Two sunny-side-up or over-easy eggs served with quickly sautéed cherry tomatoes, baby spinach, and whole-grain toast — a simple, protein-forward classic breakfast.
fields.meal_suggestion: Heat a small skillet with a teaspoon of olive oil. Sauté halved cherry tomatoes until blistered, add a handful of baby spinach and wilt briefly. In a separate nonstick pan, cook two eggs sunny-side-up or over-easy to preferred doneness. Serve eggs on the plate with the sautéed tomatoes and spinach alongside one slice of whole-grain toast (or two small slices). Optionally top eggs with a sprinkle of flaky salt, freshly ground black pepper, and a few chopped chives or a light dusting of paprika for warmth.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides high-quality protein from eggs, vitamins and antioxidants from tomatoes and spinach, and fiber/complex carbohydrates from whole-grain toast. A balanced, low-prep option that complements heavier or smoky dinners by offering a lighter, nutrient-dense breakfast.

insertion_point.reasoning: Append a classic egg-based option to Father's breakfast on the day associated with smoky-themed meals; placing at -1 adds a straightforward, protein-forward choice alongside existing breakfast wraps and smoky variations.
